army_rule.name: Slaves to Darkness
army_rule.text: Each time a model with this ability makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

faction_mechanic.name: Dark Pacts
faction_mechanic.text: Before selecting targets for this unit's ranged weapons or before making attacks with this unit's melee weapons, you can make a Dark Pact for this unit. If you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of all weapons models in this unit are equipped with by 1. However, at the end of the phase, roll one D6 for each unit from your army that made a Dark Pact this phase: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abaddon.name: Abaddon the Despoiler
abaddon.keywords: INFANTRY, CHARACTER, EPIC HERO, TERMINATOR, CHAOS UNDIVIDED, CHAOS, ABADDON THE DESPOILER
abaddon.warlord_rule: Must be your Warlord if included

abilities.name: CORE
abilities.text: Deep Strike, Leader

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: The Warmaster
abilities.text: In your Command phase, select one Warmaster ability until the start of your next Command phase: PARAGON OF HATRED (Aura) — while a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excl. DAMNED) is within 6", each time a model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll; MARK OF CHAOS ASCENDANT (Aura) — while a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit (excl. DAMNED) is within 6", models have a 4+ invulnerable save; LORD OF THE TRAITOR LEGIONS (Aura) — while a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excl. DAMNED) is within 6", you can re-roll Leadership and Battle-shock tests for that unit.

abilities.name: Dark Destiny
abilities.text: Each time this model's unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result was 7+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.text: If Abaddon is in your army, he must be your Warlord.

chaos_lord.name: Chaos Lord
chaos_lord.keywords: INFANTRY, CHARACTER, GRENADES, CHAOS, CHAOS LORD
chaos_lord.leader: Chosen, Legionaries, Nemesis Claw, Red Corsairs Raiders
chaos_lord.wargear_options: Daemon hammer can be replaced with: 1 accursed weapon, 1 Astartes chainsword. Plasma pistol can be replaced with 1 power fist.

abilities.text: Leader

abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Lord of Chaos
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use by 1CP.

abilities.name: Chance for Glory
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength, Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

chaos_lord_terminator.name: Chaos Lord in Terminator Armour

abilities.name: Formidably Resilient
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.text: Once per battle round, reduce CP cost of a Stratagem targeting this unit by 1CP.

abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Leadership tests taken for that unit.

abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: CORE
abilities.text: Lone Operative

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Agent of Discord (Aura)
abilities.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Guns Blazing
abilities.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack targeting a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit.

dark_apostle.name: Dark Apostle
dark_apostle.keywords: ALL: INFANTRY, GRENADES, CHAOS | APOSTLE ONLY: CHARACTER, DARK APOSTLE
dark_apostle.leader: Accursed Cultists, Chosen, Cultist Mob, Legionaries, Nemesis Claw, Red Corsairs Raiders

abilities.name: CORE
abilities.text: Leader

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Dark Zealotry
abilities.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a DARK APOSTLE model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Demagogue
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit's DARK APOSTLE model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Malign Sacrifice
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit contains one or more Dark Disciple models, you can select one of those models and one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, D3 mortal wounds. That Dark Disciple model is then destroyed.

dark_commune.name: Dark Commune
dark_commune.unit_size: 1 Cult Demagogue + 1 Mindwitch + 1 Iconarch + 2 Blessed Blades
dark_commune.keywords: ALL: INFANTRY, GRENADES, CHAOS, DAMNED, DARK COMMUNE | MINDWITCH: PSYKER | CULT DEMAGOGUE: CHARACTER

abilities.text: Leader

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Faithful Flock
abilities.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Dark Ritual
abilities.text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if this unit contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, until the end of the turn, this unit can declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Chaos Icon wargear
abilities.text: Each time the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

abilities.name: Enhanced Warriors

abilities.name: Surgeon Acolyte
abilities.text: Once per turn, when an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, if this unit contains FABIUS BILE, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Chirurgeon (ability)
abilities.text: The first time this unit's FABIUS BILE model is destroyed, at the end of the phase roll one D6: on a 2+, set it back up with its full wounds remaining. If attached to a unit when destroyed, must be set up attached to that unit.

abilities.name: Head Taker
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll one D6 for each model in this unit within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Herald of the Apocalypse (Aura)
abilities.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if that enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test. Cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

abilities.name: Dark Blessing (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in that unit, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Ascended Daemon

chaos_vindicator.name: Chaos Vindicator
chaos_vindicator.damaged_profile: 1-4 wounds remaining: subtract 1 from Hit rolls

abilities.name: CORE
abilities.text: Deadly Demise D3

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Siege Shield
abilities.text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). This model does not suffer the penalty to Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of enemy units.

chosen.name: Chosen

abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Chosen Marauders
abilities.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Chaos Icon wargear
abilities.text: Each time the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

defiler.name: Defiler

abilities.text: Deadly Demise D3

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Daemonforge
abilities.text: Once per Fight phase, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with the Counter-offensive Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can be moved over friendly MONSTER and VEHICLE models as if they were not there. This model can move over terrain features 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Bestial Raiders
abilities.text: If this unit starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. For the purposes of setting up this unit, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

forgefiend.name: Forgefiend
forgefiend.damaged_profile: 1-4 wounds remaining: subtract 1 from Hit rolls
forgefiend.wargear_options: 2 Hades autocannons can be replaced with 2 ectoplasma cannons. Forgefiend jaws can be replaced with 1 ectoplasma cannon and 1 armoured limbs.

abilities.name: CORE
abilities.text: Deadly Demise D3

abilities.name: FACTION

abilities.name: Daemonic Ordnance
abilities.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.

abilities.name: Stabilisation Talons
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a ranged weapon, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and any or all modifiers to the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that weapon.

abilities.text: Deadly Demise 1

abilities.name: FACTION

abilities.name: Dark Ascension (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both abilities conferred by that pact (instead of only one).

abilities.name: Devoted to Destruction
abilities.text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

masters_of_the_maelstrom.name: Masters of the Maelstrom
masters_of_the_maelstrom.unit_size: 5 Epic Hero models (Garreon the Corpsemaster, Garlon Souleater, Katar Garrix, Captain Sargotta, The Enforcer)
masters_of_the_maelstrom.keywords: ALL: INFANTRY, EPIC HERO, GRENADES, CHAOS, CHAOS UNDIVIDED, MASTERS OF THE MAELSTROM | GARLON SOULEATER: PSYKER
masters_of_the_maelstrom.special_rule: Joins Chosen, Legionaries, or Red Corsairs Raiders at Declare Battle Formations step (not an Attached unit). Only HURON BLACKHEART can join a unit this unit has joined.

abilities.name: FACTION
abilities.text: Dark Pacts

abilities.name: Choice Samples
abilities.text: While this unit's Garreon the Corpsemaster is on the battlefield, in your Command phase, select one: return 1 destroyed model (excl. CHARACTERS) to this unit, OR if one or more HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY from your army are below Starting Strength and within 3" of this unit, gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Fleet Command
abilities.text: After both players deploy, if this unit is on the battlefield, select up to three HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them, including setting them up in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Plunder
abilities.text: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, select one visible enemy unit within 12" and roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
